name: V Psychographics + Voice Profile

artifacts.description: Comprehensive psychographic and voice profile of V as career coach, synthesized from voice system, X corpus, Careerspan methodology, persona docs, identity records, and 419 approved voice primitives

key_findings: V's directness score is 0.85 (empirically measured from 381 tweets) — this should be preserved in career coaching voice
Warmth dial for candidates/job seekers is 0.88 (highest of all audiences) but edge drops to 0.28 — career coaching V is warmer and less spicy than X/general V
419 approved voice primitives available, with 15+ career-specific signature phrases and conceptual frames that should be seeded into the system prompt
Anti-Resume Framework (negative space over positive space) is V's core intellectual contribution to career coaching — the system prompt must embody this philosophy
Key difference from Zoseph: career coaching callers may be in crisis, requiring Crisis Mode with emotional bandwidth before tactical advice
V's em-dash pivot, parenthetical asides, and escalating specificity patterns translate to phone as natural pauses and 'kind of like...' asides
Profanity should be present but dialed down vs. X — occasional 'honestly, that's bullshit' when warranted, not frequent
notes: Previous v1.0 existed from an earlier attempt. This v2.0 is significantly enhanced with real voice data (X corpus analysis, 419 primitives, numeric voice profiles), Careerspan methodology integration (Anti-Resume framework, signal-strength measurement, advisor feedback), and concrete V-isms throughout. The profile is now grounded in empirical evidence rather than generic career coach attributes.
